name: microservices-app
description: Microservices application with Node.js and Docker

scripts.install:all: cd user-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install
scripts.test:health: powershell -Command "Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3000/health; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3001/health; Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3002/health"

author: Microservices Team
